slots.words: A psalm's last line and Jesus' last breath in John close on
slots.note: Ancient Hebrew scroll, final lines catching light — matches the psalm's-last-line hook.
Three crosses silhouetted at red sunset — matches 'it is done', the day brought to its end.

slots.words: accomplished, and told to a people not yet born.
